Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PotException extends RuntimeException
The base runtime exception for the PotShaper library.

This exception provides structured error handling with error codes and contextual information. It is used throughout the library to indicate failures in operations such as XML processing, shape manipulation, I/O, and parameter validation. The exception supports chaining of causes, custom error codes from the PotException.ErrorCode enumeration, and a mutable context map for attaching diagnostic data.

Usage Example


 try {
     PotShaper.loadPresentation("presentation.pot");
 } catch (PotException e) {
     System.err.println("Error: " + e.getErrorCode());
     e.getContext().forEach((k, v) -> System.err.println(k + " = " + v));
 }
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Constructor Details

    • PotException

      public PotException(String message)
      Constructs a new exception with a detail message.

      The error code is set to PotException.ErrorCode.GENERAL_ERROR and the context is initialized empty.

      Parameters:
      message - the detail message explaining the error

    • PotException

      public PotException(String message, Throwable cause)
      Constructs a new exception with a detail message and a cause.

      The error code is set to PotException.ErrorCode.GENERAL_ERROR and the context is initialized empty.

      Parameters:
      message - the detail message explaining the error
      cause - the underlying cause of this exception

    • PotException

      public PotException(Throwable cause)
      Constructs a new exception with a cause.

      The detail message is derived from the cause, the error code is set to PotException.ErrorCode.GENERAL_ERROR, and the context is initialized empty.

      Parameters:
      cause - the underlying cause of this exception

    • PotException

      public PotException(String message, PotException.ErrorCode errorCode)
      Constructs a new exception with a detail message and a specific error code.

      The context is initialized empty.

      Parameters:
      message - the detail message explaining the error
      errorCode - the error code categorizing this exception

    • PotException

      public PotException(String message, Throwable cause, PotException.ErrorCode errorCode)
      Constructs a new exception with a detail message, a cause, and a specific error code.

      The context is initialized empty.

      Parameters:
      message - the detail message explaining the error
      cause - the underlying cause of this exception
      errorCode - the error code categorizing this exception

  • Method Details

    • withContext

      public PotException withContext(String key, Object value)
      Adds a key-value pair to the context of this exception.

      The context is a mutable map that can store additional diagnostic information. This method returns this to allow for method chaining.

      Parameters:
      key - the key for the context entry
      value - the value for the context entry
      Returns:
      this exception instance for chaining

    • getErrorCode

      public PotException.ErrorCode getErrorCode()
      Returns the error code associated with this exception.
      Returns:
      the error code

    • getContext

      public Map<String,Object> getContext()
      Returns a copy of the context map.

      The returned map is a snapshot to prevent external modification of the internal state.

      Returns:
      a new map containing all context key-value pairs

    • getContextValue

      public Object getContextValue(String key)
      Retrieves a value from the context by its key.
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose associated value is to be returned
      Returns:
      the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if no mapping exists

    • wrap

      public static PotException wrap(String message, Throwable cause)
      Wraps a throwable into a PotException, preserving the original if it is already a PotException.

      If the provided cause is already an instance of PotException, it is returned directly. Otherwise, a new PotException is created with the given message and cause, using the PotException.ErrorCode.GENERAL_ERROR code.

      Usage Example

      
 try {
     parseXml(input);
 } catch (Exception e) {
     throw PotException.wrap("Failed to parse XML", e);
 }
      Parameters:
      message - the detail message for the new exception
      cause - the throwable to wrap
      Returns:
      a PotException, either the original cause or a new wrapper

    • wrap

      public static PotException wrap(String message, Throwable cause, PotException.ErrorCode errorCode)
      Wraps a throwable into a PotException with a specific error code, preserving the original if it is already a PotException.

      If the provided cause is already an instance of PotException, it is returned directly. Otherwise, a new PotException is created with the given message, cause, and error code.

      Usage Example

      
 try {
     loadFile(path);
 } catch (IOException e) {
     throw PotException.wrap("Cannot load file", e, ErrorCode.IO_ERROR);
 }
      Parameters:
      message - the detail message for the new exception
      cause - the throwable to wrap
      errorCode - the error code for the new exception
      Returns:
      a PotException, either the original cause or a new wrapper

    • ioError

      public static PotException ioError(String operation, Throwable cause)
      Creates a PotException for an I/O error during a specified operation.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.IO_ERROR code and includes the operation name in the message.

      Parameters:
      operation - a description of the I/O operation that failed
      cause - the underlying I/O exception
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an I/O error

    • xmlError

      public static PotException xmlError(String operation, Throwable cause)
      Creates a PotException for an XML manipulation error during a specified operation.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.XML_MANIPULATION_ERROR code and includes the operation name in the message.

      Parameters:
      operation - a description of the XML operation that failed
      cause - the underlying XML processing exception
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an XML manipulation error

    • fileNotFound

      public static PotException fileNotFound(String path)
      Creates a PotException for a file not found error.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.FILE_NOT_FOUND code and includes the file path in the message.

      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file that was not found
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for a file not found error

    • elementNotFound

      public static PotException elementNotFound(String uuid)
      Creates a PotException for an element not found by its UUID.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.SHAPE_NOT_FOUND code and includes the UUID in the message.

      Parameters:
      uuid - the UUID of the element that was not found
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an element not found error

    • invalidParameter

      public static PotException invalidParameter(String paramName, String message)
      Creates a PotException for an invalid parameter.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.INVALID_PARAMETER code and formats a message with the parameter name and details.

      Parameters:
      paramName - the name of the invalid parameter
      message - a detailed explanation of why the parameter is invalid
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an invalid parameter error

    • unsupportedOperation

      public static PotException unsupportedOperation(String operation)
      Creates a PotException for an unsupported operation.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION code and includes the operation name in the message.

      Parameters:
      operation - the name or description of the unsupported operation
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an unsupported operation error

    • slideIndexOutOfBounds

      public static PotException slideIndexOutOfBounds(int index, int slideCount)
      Creates a PotException for a slide index that is out of bounds.

      The exception uses the PotException.ErrorCode.INVALID_PARAMETER code, formats a descriptive message, and adds the index and slide count to the context for diagnostics.

      Parameters:
      index - the requested slide index
      slideCount - the total number of slides
      Returns:
      a new PotException configured for an out-of-bounds slide index error
